name: Chicken and Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and place it in a pot covered with water. Add the bay leaf, chopped onion, celery, minced garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then simmer until the chicken falls off the bone easily. Remove all pieces of chicken and bones from the broth.
3. Taste the broth and add salt and pepper as needed.
4. Mix together the flour, salt, and baking powder in a separate bowl.
5. In another bowl, mix the milk and oil with the dry ingredients until a smooth dough forms.
6. Form the dough into a ball using your hands. Roll out between waxed paper about 1/8-inch thick, then cut into long strips.
7. Drop the dumpling strips into the boiling broth. Add pieces of chicken to the broth as well.
8. Cover and reduce heat. Cook until the dumplings are tender, at least 20 minutes.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
